plugins.name: llamaparse-plugin
plugins.description: LlamaCloud document operations for Claude Code and Cowork: parse PDFs/Office docs/scans to markdown, extract structured JSON against a schema (LlamaExtract), categorize documents with confidence scores (LlamaClassify), and split long documents into typed sections (LlamaSplit beta). Each capability ships as its own lazy-loaded skill so feature context only enters Claude's window when needed.
